message:
fix(scope): rollback task state on spawn_local without active scheduler

Previously, spawn_local without an active worker-local scheduler would
log a debug message but still return Ok(handle), leaving the task
permanently parked with no scheduler to poll it (silent deadlock).

Now spawn_local returns Err(SpawnError::LocalSchedulerUnavailable) and
rolls back all side effects: removes the task from the local ready
queue, removes it from the owning region, and deallocates the task
arena slot.

Also adds two tests:
- spawn_local_without_scheduler_fails_and_rolls_back: verifies error
  return and clean rollback (no leaked tasks or region entries)
- Updates spawn_local_creates_task test to set up ScopedLocalReady and
  ScopedWorkerId guards so it exercises the real scheduling path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
